title: mentha malinvaldii
intro: Mentha malinvaldii, also known as woolly mint, is a rare species of mint native to New Zealand. It is often used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful for treating digestive issues and wounds. The health benefits of Mentha malinvaldii include its ability to soothe stomach upset, alleviate headaches, and aid in respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Mentha malinvaldii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
